title: anaphalioides alpina
intro: Anaphalioides alpina, also known as Alpine cudweed, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions. Alpine cudweed has been used to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support immune function, among other health benefits. Herbal preparations of A. alpina include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
